patches.summary: Migrate all IPA web service paths from legacy PHP to REST endpoints.
patches.reason: IPA deprecated PHP-based invocation from WS18 onwards (email from Gestore IPA / AgID, 2026-05-18). WS18–WS23 never had a PHP form; calling them via /public-ws/*.php caused HTTP 500. Source: WS00_INDICE_DEI_SERVIZI.pdf §2 (docs/ipa-reference/).
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... + go vet ./... pass. Pre-existing test failure in TestAdaptiveLimiter_HalvesOnRateLimit (cliutil) confirmed unrelated to this patch.

patches.summary: Add pec ente/storico/cerca (WS20/21/22) and aoo storico (WS19) commands.
patches.reason: These WS18+ endpoints were previously documented as 'HTTP 500 server bugs' but actually failed because the PHP invocation path was used. With the correct REST endpoints they are functional.
patches.validated_outcome: go build ./... passes. Live test against IPA pending (requires AUTH_ID).

patches.summary: Expand servizi command help for IPA digital services discovery.
patches.reason: The servizi command exposed portal-only digital service data, but its help did not explain practical workflows such as finding an Albo Pretorio URL via tipologia 1 or filtering broad text matches.
patches.validated_outcome: go run ./cmd/openipa-pp-cli servizi --help and subcommand help render expanded guidance.
